zh.lifeSummary: 當Bridget Adrian Drury於1534年9月11日出生在英國素福爾可時，她的父親Sir William Drury34歲，母親Elizabeth Sothill29歲。她於1556年與Sir Henry Yelverton在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1581年3月在英國諾福爾可盧加姆享年46歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可盧加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bridget Adrian Drury于1534年9月11日出生在英国素福爾可时，她的父亲Sir William Drury34岁，母亲Elizabeth Sothill29岁。她于1556年与Sir Henry Yelverton在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1581年3月在英国諾福爾可盧加姆享年46岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可盧加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Drury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Bridget
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Brighid (pronounced ‘breed’); . This was the name of an ancient Celtic goddess, which in Gaulish would have been Brigindos, meaning ‘the exalted one’. St Brigid of Kildare ( c.450– c.525 ) is one of the patron saints of Ireland. Very few facts are known about her life. She founded a religious house for women at Kildare, and is said to be have been buried at Downpatrick, where St Patrick and St Columba were also buried. Many of the stories of miracles told about St Brigid seem to be Christianized versions of pagan legends concerning the goddess. The popularity of the name was further reinforced throughout Europe, especially in Scandinavia in the form Birgit , as the name of the patron saint of Sweden ( 1304–73 ). She was a noblewoman of Irish stock who, after the death of her husband, founded an order of nuns, the Bridgettines. Later she went to Rome and attempted to introduce religious reforms there.

nameMeanings.name: Adrian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of the Latin name Hadrianus ‘man from Hadria’. Hadria was a town in northern Italy, which gave its name to the Adriatic Sea; it is of unknown derivation. The initial H- has always been very volatile. The name was borne by the Roman emperor Publius Aelius Hadrianus , during whose reign ( ad 117–138 ) Hadrian's Wall was built across northern England. The name was later taken by several early popes, including the only English pope, Nicholas Breakspeare (Adrian IV). It was in early use among immigrants from the Low Countries, and is found in some English regions from the mid-16th century. It has enjoyed considerable popularity in the English-speaking world since the late 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Bridget Adrian Drury was born on 11 September 1534, in Suffolk, England, her father, Sir William Drury, was 34 and her mother, Elizabeth Sothill, was 29. She married Sir Henry Yelverton in 1556, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died in March 1581, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Rougham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bridget Adrian Drury est née le 11 septembre 1534, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Drury, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Sothill, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Yelverton en 1556, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en mars 1581, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bridget Adrian Drury am 11. September 1534 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Drury 34 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Sothill 29. Sie hat 1556 in Suffolk, England Sir Henry Yelverton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb im März 1581 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Rougham, Norfolk, England und wurde in Rougham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bridget Adrian Drury è nata il il 11 settembre 1534 nel Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir William Drury, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Sothill, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry Yelverton nel 1556, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel marzo 1581, nel Rougham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Rougham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Bridget Adrian Druryが1534年9月11日にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Sir William Druryは34歳，母Elizabeth Sothillは29歳であった。1556年にイギリススフォルクでSir Henry Yelvertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1581年3月にイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで46歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクロウアムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bridget Adrian Drury(이)가 1534년 9월 11일 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Drury(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Sothill(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1556년 영국 수폴크에서 Sir Henry Yelverton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1581년 3월 영국 노르폴크 루그함에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 루그함에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Yelverton em 1556, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bridget Adrian Drury родилась 11 сентября 1534 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Drury было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Sothill, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Yelverton в 1556 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла марта 1581 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия.
